title: ferray-linalg: no cross product function
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy 2.0 added np.linalg.cross(x1, x2, axis=-1) as part of the Array API standard. ferray-ufunc has cross() in arithmetic.rs, but it's not in ferray-linalg. NumPy's version supports an axis parameter and stacked arrays. Check if ferray-ufunc's cross() is feature-complete or if the linalg version needs additional axis/batching support.
